# Real-Time Communication (Socket.IO)

Socket.IO client implementation for AI chat, DM, typing indicators, and cross-tab state sync.

**Reference:** `client/src/services/socket.ts`

## Connection Lifecycle

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Socket Service
  participant WS as Socket.IO Server

  C->>S: connect(token)
  S->>S: Cross-tab sync init
  S->>WS: io(WS_URL, { auth: { token } })
  WS-->>S: connect
  S->>S: join user:{userId} room
  S->>C: setConnected(true)
  S->>WS: fetchMessages() on reconnect
```

## Connection Management

```typescript
class SocketService {
  connect(token: string) {
    // If already connected with same token → no-op
    // If connected with different token → disconnect first
    this.socket = io(WS_URL, {
      auth: { token },
      transports: ['websocket', 'polling'],
      reconnection: true,
      reconnectionAttempts: 5,
      reconnectionDelay: 1000,
    });
  }

  reconnectWithNewToken(newToken: string) {
    // Called after token refresh — disconnects and reconnects
  }
}
```

## Socket Events

### Inbound Events (Server → Client)

| Event | Handler | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `message:receive` | `chat-store.addMessageIfUnique()` | Add AI message or replace optimistic (via `clientId`) |
| `character:typing` | `chat-store.setTyping(true)` | Show typing indicator + 30s safety timeout |
| `character:mood_change` | `character-store.updateMood()` | Update character mood |
| `character:mood_update` | `character-store.setMoodInfo()` | Full mood info with score, emoji, factors |
| `character:affection_change` | `character-store.setAffection()` | Update affection + show level-up/relationship modals |
| `notification:proactive` | `notification-store.showProactiveNotification()` | AI-initiated messages (morning, night, miss_you) |
| `notification:ai_message` | `notification-store.showAINotification()` | Legacy proactive notification |
| `quest:completed` | `notification-store.showQuestCompleted()` | Quest completion toast |
| `milestone:unlocked` | `notification-store.showMilestoneUnlocked()` | Milestone unlocked modal |
| `notification:new` | `notification-store.showGeneralNotification()` | Generic server notification |
| `sync:state_request` | Emit `sync:response` | Share state with requesting tab |
| `sync:state_receive` | `chat-store.mergeMessages()` | Apply state from another tab |
| `dm:receive` | (DM module) | User-to-user message received |
| `dm:typing` | (DM module) | Other user typing in DM |

### Outbound Events (Client → Server)

| Event | Method | Payload |
|---|---|---|
| `message:send` | `sendMessage(charId, content)` | `{ characterId, content, messageType }` |
| `typing:start` | `startTyping(charId)` | `characterId` |
| `typing:stop` | `stopTyping(charId)` | `characterId` |
| `sync:request` | `requestSync()` | — |
| `sync:response` | Internal | `{ targetSocketId, messages, typing }` |
| `dm:send` | (DM module) | `{ conversationId, content, clientId }` |
| `dm:typing` | (DM module) | `{ conversationId }` |
| `dm:read` | (DM module) | `{ conversationId }` |

## Optimistic UI Pattern

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant CS as Chat Store
  participant S as Socket
  participant SV as Server

  U->>CS: Type message, hit send
  CS->>CS: Add temp message with clientId
  CS->>S: emit message:send
  S->>SV: Process (AI call, DB save)
  SV-->>S: emit message:receive (user msg + clientId)
  S->>CS: replaceMessage(clientId, realMsg)
  SV-->>S: emit message:receive (AI response)
  S->>CS: addMessageIfUnique(AI msg)
```

**Flow:**
1. Client immediately adds message with `id = clientId` (temp ID)
2. Server processes, echoes back with real `id` + matching `clientId`
3. `replaceMessage()` swaps temp → real by matching `clientId`
4. If temp not found, AI response added normally

## Typing Indicator

- **Display:** Shows "AI is typing..." with animated dots
- **Safety timeout:** Auto-clears after 30 seconds if no response arrives
- **Delay:** Server-side typing delay proportional to response length (`min 1.5s, max 4s`)

## External Listener Tracking

The socket service tracks external `on()` listeners for automatic re-registration after reconnection:

```typescript
private externalListeners: ExternalListener[] = [];

on(event: string, callback: (...args: T) => void) {
  this.externalListeners.push({ event, callback });
  this.socket?.on(event, callback);
}

private reRegisterExternalListeners() {
  this.externalListeners.forEach(({ event, callback }) => {
    this.socket?.on(event, callback);
  });
}
```

# Frontend UI Components Radix UI primitives, TailwindCSS theming, Framer Motion animations, and data visualization. **Reference:** `client/src/components/` ## Component Stack | Library | Purpose | Count | |---|---|---| | **Radix UI** | Accessible headless primitives | 13 components | | **TailwindCSS** | Utility-first CSS with custom theme | Global | | **Framer Motion** | Animations & transitions | Throughout | | **class-variance-authority** | Variant management | Variant configs | | **clsx + tailwind-merge** | Conditional class merging | Utility | | **Lucide React** | Icon library | 50+ icons | | **Chart.js + react-chartjs-2** | Data visualization | Analytics, leaderboard | ## Radix UI Components | Component | Usage | |---|---| | `Avatar` | User/character profile images with fallback | | `Dialog` | Modal dialogs (settings, confirmations) | | `DropdownMenu` | Context menus, user menu | | `Toast` | Notification toasts (via sonner/toast) | | `Tabs` | Settings pages, tabbed interfaces | | `Select` | Dropdown selections (occupation, gender) | | `Switch` | Toggle settings (notifications, premium) | | `Slider` | Affection level, settings ranges | | `Progress` | XP bar, quest progress, loading | | `Tooltip` | Info tooltips on hover | | `Accordion` | FAQ, expandable sections | | `AlertDialog` | Destructive action confirmations | | `Separator` | Visual dividers | ## Utility Functions ```typescript // lib/utils.ts import { clsx, type ClassValue } from 'clsx'; import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge'; export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)); } ``` ## TailwindCSS Custom Theme ```typescript // tailwind.config.ts (key extensions) theme: { extend: { colors: { primary: { /* brand colors */ }, accent: { /* accent palette */ }, }, animation: { 'fade-in': 'fadeIn 0.3s ease-out', 'slide-up': 'slideUp 0.4s ease-out', 'pulse-glow': 'pulseGlow 2s ease-in-out infinite', }, }, } ``` ## Framer Motion Patterns ### Page Transitions ```typescript {children} ``` ### Typing Indicator ```typescript ••• ``` ### Level Up Modal ```typescript 🎉 Level Up! ``` ## Class Variance Authority (CVA) ```typescript import { cva } from 'class-variance-authority'; const buttonVariants = cva( 'inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md font-medium transition-colors', { variants: { variant: { default: 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90', destructive: 'bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground', outline: 'border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent', ghost: 'hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground', }, size: { default: 'h-10 px-4 py-2', sm: 'h-9 rounded-md px-3', lg: 'h-11 rounded-md px-8', }, }, defaultVariants: { variant: 'default', size: 'default' }, } ); ``` ## Chart.js Integration Used in analytics dashboard and leaderboard: ```typescript import { Line, Bar } from 'react-chartjs-2'; ``` ## Component Index ``` components/ ├── ui/ → Radix-based primitives (13 components) │ ├── avatar.tsx │ ├── dialog.tsx │ ├── dropdown-menu.tsx │ ├── toast.tsx │ └── ... ├── chat/ → Chat-specific components ├── character/ → Character display & customization ├── layout/ → Header, sidebar, navigation ├── quest/ → Quest cards & progress ├── shop/ → Shop items & inventory └── error/ → Error boundary & fallbacks ``` ## Related - [State Management](./state-management.md) - [Routing Structure](./routing-structure.md) - [Design Guidelines](../architecture/overview.md)

# Backend Routes

Complete API endpoint reference organized by module.

**Reference:** `server/src/routes/index.ts`, `server/src/modules/*/`

## Route Mounting

```typescript
router.use('/auth', authRouter);
router.use('/users', userRouter);
router.use('/character', characterRouter);
router.use('/chat', chatRouter);
router.use('/quests', questRouter);
router.use('/gifts', giftRouter);
router.use('/shop', giftRouter);       // Alias
router.use('/scenes', sceneRouter);
router.use('/memories', memoryRouter);
router.use('/game', gameRouter);
router.use('/analytics', analyticsRouter);
router.use('/dm', dmRouter);
router.use('/leaderboard', leaderboardRouter);
router.use('/admin', adminRouter);
router.use('/payment', paymentRouter);
router.get('/config/tier-plans', ...);  // Public
```

# Backend Modules

Server-side module organization, responsibilities, and key service flows.

**Reference:** `server/src/modules/`

## Module Map

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph AI
    AI[ai.service]
    CS[conversation-summary]
    FL[facts-learning]
    PN[proactive-notification]
  end
  subgraph Core
    CH[chat.service]
    CHA[character.service]
    MO[mood.service]
    REL[relationship.service]
  end
  subgraph Gamification
    Q[quest.service]
    G[gift.service]
    SC[scene.service]
    MEM[memory.service]
    AM[auto-memory.service]
  end
  subgraph Communication
    DM[dm.service]
    SO[socket handlers]
  end
  subgraph Business
    LB[leaderboard.service]
    PAY[payment.service]
    ANA[analytics.service]
    TEL[telemetry.service]
  end
  subgraph Infrastructure
    UP[upload.service]
    ADM[tier-config.service]
  end

  AI --> CH
  AI --> CHA
  FL --> CHA
  CS --> AI
  CH --> SO
  CHA --> MEM
  AM --> MEM
  G --> CHA
  Q --> CH
  DM --> SO
```

## Module Details

### AI Module (`ai/`)

**Services:** `ai.service.ts`, `conversation-summary.service.ts`, `facts-learning.service.ts`, `proactive-notification.service.ts`

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `ai.service` | Groq/OpenAI (OpenAI-compatible SDK), system prompt generation, chat processing, emotion detection, inline fact extraction, quality scoring |
| `conversation-summary` | AI-generated summaries every 10 messages, stores `summary`, `keyTopics`, `emotionalTone`, `messageCount` |
| `facts-learning` | Batch fact extraction every 10 messages, importance scoring (1-10), fact decay (event: 30d, memory: 60d, trait/preference: permanent) |
| `proactive-notification` | AI-initiated messages (morning greeting, night greeting, miss_you, random_thought, anniversary, comeback_message), debounced 5min/user |

**AI Provider:** Groq (OpenAI-compatible SDK), model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile` (configurable via `AI_MODEL`).

### Chat Module (`chat/`)

| Responsibility | Implementation |
|---|---|
| `sendMessage` flow | AI call → save messages → update affection/mood/level → extract facts → trigger quests/memories |
| Paginated history | `findMany` with skip/take, ordered by `createdAt DESC` |
| Search | Full-text search on message content |
| Message dedup | Redis setNX with `dedup:{userId}:{clientId}` key (60s TTL) |

### Character Module (`character/`)

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `character.service` | CRUD, personality, relationship stage calculation, XP/level progression, milestone rewards, fact management, avatar customization |
| `mood.service` | Mood calculation from time since chat, gifts, messages, affection, relationship stage |
| `relationship.service` | Relationship stage transitions, progression tracking |
| `template.service` | Character template CRUD with `isDefault`/`isActive` flags |

**XP Formula:** `100 + (level - 1) * 50` per level-up. Total XP for level N: `100*(N-1) + 25*(N-1)*(N-2)`.

### Quest Module (`quest/`)

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| Daily | Reset daily, e.g., "Send 10 messages" |
| Weekly | Reset weekly, e.g., "Send 50 messages" |
| Story | One-time progression quests |

**Progress tracking:** Automatic via chat events. Claiming rewards grants coins, gems, XP, affection.

### Gift Module (`gift/`)

| Flow | Description |
|---|---|
| Shop catalog | List gifts with price (coins/gems), rarity, affection boost |
| Purchase | Deduct coins/gems, add to inventory |
| Send to character | Remove from inventory, trigger AI reaction, apply affection boost |

### Scene Module (`scene/`)

| Unlock Method | Description |
|---|---|
| Level | Unlocked at character level threshold |
| Purchase | Buy with coins/gems |
| Quest | Reward from quest completion |
| Relationship stage | Unlocked at specific affection threshold |

Scene categories mapped to relationship stages (e.g., LOVER → `bedroom`, `vacation_resort`, `stargazing`, `proposal_spot`).

### Memory Module (`memory/`)

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `memory.service` | CRUD, pagination, favorites toggle, milestone creation |
| `auto-memory.service` | Auto-generated memories for: stage change, level up, conversation milestones, gifts, events |

### DM Module (`dm/`)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| 1-on-1 chats | Direct messages between two users |
| Group chats | 3-50 members per conversation |
| Typing indicators | Broadcast to other conversation members |
| Read receipts | `markRead()` per user per conversation |
| Unread count | Aggregate unread messages across all conversations |

### Leaderboard Module (`leaderboard/`)

| Category | Description | Cache |
|---|---|---|
| `level` | Ranked by character level | 5 minutes |
| `affection` | Ranked by affection score | 5 minutes |
| `streak` | Ranked by login streak | 5 minutes |
| `achievements` | Ranked by achievement count | 5 minutes |

### Payment Module (`payment/`)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| Stripe subscriptions | Create/manage subscriptions via Stripe SDK |
| Webhooks | Handle `invoice.payment_succeeded`, `customer.subscription.deleted`, etc. |
| Billing | Tier management (FREE, BASIC, PRO, ULTIMATE) |
| Auto-downgrade | Expired premium → FREE tier on next request |

### Monitoring Module (`monitoring/`)

**Telemetry service:** Tracks events across categories:

| Category | Events |
|---|---|
| Request | API request duration, status codes |
| Error | Error frequency, types, stack traces |
| Auth | Login attempts, token refreshes, failures |
| Socket | Connection/disconnection, message rates |
| Job | Background job execution, success/failure |
| Security | Rate limit hits, blocked requests |
| Business | User signups, purchases, premium conversions |

**Metric rollups:** Periodic aggregation for dashboard display.

### Upload Module (`upload/`)

| Feature | Implementation |
|---|---|
| Storage | DigitalOcean Spaces (S3-compatible) |
| Upload | Multer middleware + S3 SDK |
| File types | Images (avatar, gifts, memories) |

### Admin Module (`admin/`)

| Controller | Description |
|---|---|
| `admin-tier-config` | CRUD for tier pricing/feature configs |
| `admin-pricing` | View/update pricing tiers |

Auth: Separate `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET` verification.

## Related

- [Routes](./routes.md)
- [Middleware](./middleware.md)
- [Socket Handlers](./socket-handlers.md)
- [System Architecture](../architecture/system-design.md)

function_args.content:
# Memory System

Long-term memory through conversation summaries, character facts with decay, and auto-generated memories.

**Reference:** `server/src/modules/memory/memory.service.ts`, `server/src/modules/ai/ai.service.ts`, `server/src/modules/ai/facts-learning.service.ts`, `server/src/modules/ai/conversation-summary.service.ts`

## Memory Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  A[Chat Messages] --> B{Every 10 Messages}
  B --> C[Conversation Summary]
  B --> D[Batch Fact Extraction]
  A --> E[Inline Fact Extraction]
  E --> F[Character Facts]
  D --> F
  C --> G[ConversationSummary Model]
  F --> H[Fact Decay System]
  G --> I[System Prompt Context]
  H --> I
  I --> J[AI Response with Memory]
```

## Conversation Summaries

AI-generated summaries stored every 10 messages in `ConversationSummary` model:

```prisma
model ConversationSummary {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId       String
  characterId  String
  summary      String   // 2-3 sentence Vietnamese summary
  keyTopics    String[] // ["công việc", "gia đình"]
  emotionalTone String  // positive|neutral|negative|romantic|sad|excited
  messageCount Int
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
}
```

**Retrieval:** Last 3 summaries injected into system prompt as long-term context, ordered chronologically (oldest first).

## Character Facts System

Facts categorized by decay type — mimicking human memory retention curves:

### Fact Categories & Decay

| Category | Decay Type | Schedule | Examples |
|---|---|---|---|
| `trait` | **Permanent** | Never decays | Tên, quê quán, nghề nghiệp, tính cách |
| `preference` | **Permanent** | Never decays | Thích cafe, ghét cà rốt |
| `memory` | **Evolving** (slow) | -1 importance after 60 days | Kỷ niệm, milestone |
| `event` | **Temporal** (fast) | -1 importance after 30 days | Việc hôm nay/tuần này |

### Fact Extraction Methods

**1. Inline** — Every message in AI response JSON:
```json
{ "facts": [{ "key": "quê_quán", "value": "Hà Nội", "category": "trait" }] }
```

**2. Batch** — Every 10 messages via `factsLearningService.extractAndSaveFacts()`:
- Analyzes last 20 messages with AI
- Upserts by `characterId + key` (snake_case normalized)
- Invalidates character cache on new facts

### Importance Scoring (1-10)

| Category | Base | Boosts |
|---|---|---|
| `trait` | 8 | +1 if value > 50 chars, +1 if > 100 |
| `preference` | 7 | Same length boosts |
| `memory` | 6 | Same length boosts |
| `event` | 5 | Same length boosts |

## Memory Types (Auto-Generated)

| Type | Trigger | Example |
|---|---|---|
| `MILESTONE` | Level up, stage change | `Đạt Level 10! 🎉` |
| `CONVERSATION` | 100+ messages | `100 tin nhắn đầu tiên` |
| `GIFT` | Gift received | `Nhận bó hoa tulip` |
| `EVENT` | Special events | `Kỷ niệm 30 ngày quen nhau` |
| `PHOTO` | Photo shared | (future) |
| `SPECIAL` | Manual creation | (user-created) |
| `DATE` | Virtual date | (future) |
| `CHAT` | Chat milestone | (future) |

### Auto-Generated Trigger Example

```typescript
await prisma.memory.create({
  data: {
    type: 'MILESTONE',
    title: `Đạt Level ${level}! 🎉`,
    description: `Mở khóa: ${unlocks.join(', ')}`,
    milestone: `LEVEL_${level}`,
    metadata: { level, coins, gems, affection, unlocks },
  },
});
```

## Memory Retrieval in System Prompt

Top 20 facts (by importance DESC) injected into system prompt:
```
THÔNG TIN ĐÃ NHỚ VỀ {userName}:
- quê_quán: Hà Nội
- món_ăn_yêu_thích: phở
```

## Related

- [System Prompt](./system-prompt.md)
- [Character Models](../database/character-models.md)
- [Chat Models](../database/chat-models.md)

# Emotion Detection

Detects emotions from user messages and adapts AI response tone, content, and affection changes.

**Reference:** `server/src/modules/ai/ai.service.ts`

## Emotion Detection Pipeline

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  A[User Message] --> B[AI Model Analysis]
  B --> C{Emotion Classification}
  C --> D[happy/sad/angry/romantic/neutral/excited/sleepy]
  D --> E[Affect Response]
  E --> F[Response Tone]
  E --> G[Affection Change]
  E --> H[Mood Change]
```

## Emotion Types

| Emotion | Detection Signals | AI Response |
|---|---|---|
| `happy` | Positive words, excitement, good news | Chia vui, emoji tích cực, +2-3 affection |
| `sad` | Buồn, cô đơn, thất vọng | An ủi, dịu dàng, +1-2 affection |
| `angry` | Từ mạnh, bực tức | Bình tĩnh, không đối đầu, -1 if at character |
| `romantic` | Lời yêu thương, nhớ | Ngọt ngào, +3-5 affection |
| `neutral` | Tin nhắn thông thường | Trả lời tự nhiên theo ngữ cảnh |
| `excited` | Hào hứng, phấn khích | Năng lượng cao, matching excitement |
| `sleepy` | Mệt, buồn ngủ, khuya | Nhẹ nhàng, dỗ ngủ, quan tâm |

## Message Quality Scoring

AI evaluates each message (0-10), determines affection change:

| Score | Quality | Affection Change |
|---|---|---|
| 9-10 | Xuất sắc: chân thành, tâm huyết | +4 to +5 |
| 7-8 | Tốt: thể hiện quan tâm | +2 to +3 |
| 5-6 | Bình thường | +1 |
| 3-4 | Ngắn gọn,敷衍 | 0 |
| 0-2 | Thiếu tôn trọng, xúc phạm | -1 to -5 |

**Profanity special case:** `affection_change = -3 to -5`, `quality_score = 0-1`.

## Emotion → Response Mapping

### Response Tone Examples
- **Happy:** `"Em vui quá! 🥰 Hôm nay của anh thế nào?"`
- **Sad:** `"Anh ơi, em ở đây nè... Anh muốn tâm sự không? 🤗"`
- **Romantic:** `"Em cũng nhớ anh nhiều lắm... 💕"`

### Mood Change
```
User emotion → AI mood adjustment
  happy/excited/romantic → moodScore +10 to +20
  sad → moodScore -5 (empathy)
  angry (at character) → moodScore -15
```

## Integration with Chat Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant S as Socket
  participant AI as AI Service

  U->>S: message:send
  S->>AI: Process with system prompt
  AI->>AI: Detect emotion, calculate affection_change
  AI->>AI: Extract inline facts
  AI-->>S: JSON { message, emotion, facts, evaluation }
  S->>S: Save messages, update affection/mood
  S-->>U: message:receive + emotion
```

## Forbidden Topic Handling

| Situation | Response Pattern |
|---|---|
| Technical/code | `"Em không rành chuyện đó lắm 😅 Kể em nghe hôm nay của anh đi?"` |
| Illegal content | `"Câu này em không giúp được... nói chuyện về tụi mình nhé?"` |
| Insults | `"Anh ơi, em không thích nghe vậy đâu 😔 Mình nói nhẹ nhàng nhé?"` |

## Related

- [System Prompt](./system-prompt.md)
- [Character Personality](./character-personality.md)
- [Socket Handlers](../backend/socket-handlers.md)

# Frontend State Management

Zustand stores with localStorage persistence, cross-tab sync via BroadcastChannel, and React Query for server state.

**Reference:** `client/src/store/`

## Store Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph Zustand
    A[auth-store] --> B[chat-store]
    A --> C[character-store]
    A --> D[scene-store]
    A --> E[notification-store]
    A --> F[language-store]
    A --> G[premium-store]
  end
  subgraph Persistence
    B --> H[localStorage: vgfriend-chat]
    A --> I[localStorage: vgfriend-auth]
  end
  subgraph Cross-Tab
    A -.-> J[BroadcastChannel: vgfriend-token-sync]
  end
  subgraph Server State
    K[@tanstack/react-query]
  end
```

## Zustand Stores

| Store | Persistence Key | Key State |
|---|---|---|
| **auth-store** | `vgfriend-auth` (partialize: `accessToken` only) | user, accessToken, isAuthenticated, isLoading |
| **chat-store** | `vgfriend-chat` (max 100 messages) | messages, isTyping, isConnected, isLoading |
| **character-store** | None | character, mood, isLoading |
| **scene-store** | None | scenes, activeScene, isLoading |
| **notification-store** | None | notifications queue |
| **language-store** | None | language |
| **premium-store** | None | tier, features, isLoading |

## Chat Store Key Behaviors

```typescript
// Optimistic UI: replace temp message with real server message
replaceMessage(tempId: string, realMessage: Message)

// Dedup: skip if message id already exists
addMessageIfUnique(message: Message)

// Cross-tab merge: merge without overwriting existing
mergeMessages(newMessages: Message[])

// Server authoritative: replaces local state entirely
fetchMessages() → API call → setMessages()
```

`MAX_PERSISTED_MESSAGES = 100` — trims oldest on every mutation.

## Cross-Tab Synchronization

### BroadcastChannel (`vgfriend-token-sync`)

```typescript
// On token refresh (api.ts)
this.tokenSyncChannel?.postMessage({
  type: 'token-updated', accessToken: newToken, user: newUser,
});

// On receive — update localStorage
this.tokenSyncChannel.onmessage = (event) => {
  if (event.data?.type === 'token-updated') {
    const stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('vgfriend-auth'));
    stored.state.accessToken = event.data.accessToken;
    localStorage.setItem('vgfriend-auth', JSON.stringify(stored));
  }
};
```

### Storage Event Listener (auth-store fallback)

Listens to `vgfriend-auth` storage changes, validates JWT structure (3 base64 segments), then applies token. On logout from another tab, clears all user-scoped stores.

## Server State: React Query

`@tanstack/react-query` for API caching with `staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000`. Socket events call `queryClient.invalidateQueries()` on affection change, level up, mood change.

## State Update Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant S as Socket Event
  participant Z as Zustand Store
  participant Q as React Query

  S->>Z: character:affection_change
  Z->>Z: setAffection(newAffection)
  Z->>Q: invalidateQueries(['character'])
  Z->>N: Show notification toast
```

# Socket Handlers

Socket.IO server-side handlers for AI chat, DM, cross-tab sync, and gamification notifications.

**Reference:** `server/src/sockets/index.ts`

## Socket Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  C1[Tab 1] --> S[Socket.IO Server]
  C2[Tab 2] --> S
  C3[Tab 3] --> S
  S --> R[user:{userId} Room]
  S --> A[AI Service]
  S --> D[DM Service]
  S --> Q[Quest Service]
```

## Auth Middleware

```typescript
io.use(async (socket, next) => {
  const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
  const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
  // Cache-aside: Redis (10min TTL) → DB
  socket.userId = user.id;
  next();
});
```

On connect: socket joins `user:{userId}` room for cross-tab sync.

## Handler: `message:send`

AI chat with Redis dedup (setNX):

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant T as Tab
  participant S as Server
  participant AI as AI Service

  T->>S: message:send { characterId, content, clientId }
  S->>S: Rate limit (10/10s), validate length ≤ 2000
  S->>S: setNX dedup:{userId}:{clientId} → drop if duplicate
  S->>T: emit character:typing (room broadcast)
  S->>AI: chatService.sendMessage()
  AI-->>S: { userMessage, aiMessage, emotion, affectionChange, ... }
  S->>T: emit message:receive (user msg + clientId, isOwn: true)
  S->>S: Delay: 1000 + random(2000) or length-proportional
  S->>T: emit message:receive (AI response)
  S->>T: emit character:affection_change (if changed)
  S->>T: emit quest:completed / milestone:unlocked (if any)
```

**Response broadcasts (all to `user:{userId}` room):**

| Event | Condition |
|---|---|
| `message:receive` (user) | Always — `isOwn: true, clientId` |
| `character:typing` | Always — before AI processing |
| `message:receive` (AI) | After typing delay |
| `character:affection_change` | If changed (includes level/relationship) |
| `character:mood_change` | If mood changed |
| `quest:completed` | If quests completed |
| `milestone:unlocked` | If milestones unlocked |

## Handler: `dm:send`

User-to-user messaging (1-on-1 + group 3-50):

```typescript
socket.on('dm:send', async ({ conversationId, content, clientId }) => {
  // Rate limit: 20/60s, Idempotency: dedup_dm setNX
  const message = await dmService.sendMessage(userId, conversationId, content);
  // Broadcast to all members (cached 5min)
  members.forEach(m => io.to(`user:${m.userId}`).emit('dm:receive', message));
});
```

| Event | Rate Limit | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dm:send` | 20/60s | Send DM with member broadcast |
| `dm:typing` | 30/60s | Typing to other members |
| `dm:read` | None | Mark conversation as read |

## Handler: Cross-Tab Sync

```
Tab A (new)           Server              Tab B (existing)
   |                     |                      |
   |-- sync:request ---->|                      |
   |                     |-- sync:state_request->|
   |                     |<-- sync:response -----|
   |<-- sync:state_receive                      |
```

## Handler: `character:mood_check`

```typescript
socket.on('character:mood_check', async ({ characterId }) => {
  const mood = await moodService.getCurrentMood(characterId);
  io.to(userRoom).emit('character:mood_update', { characterId, ...mood });
});
```

## Proactive Notification Check

On every connection, checks proactive AI notifications (debounced 5min/user):
```typescript
const result = await proactiveNotificationService.checkAndSendNotification(characterId);
if (result.shouldSend) {
  io.to(userRoom).emit('notification:proactive', { characterId, characterName, type, message });
}
```

## AI Module (`ai/`)

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `ai.service` | Groq/OpenAI SDK, system prompt generation, chat processing, emotion detection, inline fact extraction, quality scoring |
| `conversation-summary` | AI summaries every 10 messages: `summary`, `keyTopics`, `emotionalTone`, `messageCount` |
| `facts-learning` | Batch fact extraction every 10 messages, importance scoring (1-10), decay (event: 30d, memory: 60d) |
| `proactive-notification` | AI-initiated messages (morning, night, miss_you, anniversary, comeback), debounced 5min/user |

**Provider:** Groq (OpenAI-compatible), model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile` (via `AI_MODEL` env).

## Chat Module (`chat/`)

| Feature | Implementation |
|---|---|
| `sendMessage` | AI call → save messages → update affection/mood/level → extract facts → trigger quests/memories |
| History | Paginated `findMany` with skip/take, `createdAt DESC` |
| Search | Full-text on message content |
| Dedup | Redis setNX `dedup:{userId}:{clientId}` (60s TTL) |

## Character Module (`character/`)

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `character.service` | CRUD, relationship stages, XP/level, milestone rewards, facts, avatar customization |
| `mood.service` | Mood from time since chat, gifts, messages, affection, relationship stage |
| `relationship.service` | Stage transitions, progression tracking |
| `template.service` | Template CRUD with `isDefault`/`isActive` flags |

**XP formula:** `100 + (level - 1) * 50` per level. Total for level N: `100*(N-1) + 25*(N-1)*(N-2)`.

## Quest Module (`quest/`)

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| Daily | Reset daily (e.g., "Send 10 messages") |
| Weekly | Reset weekly (e.g., "Send 50 messages") |
| Story | One-time progression quests |

Rewards: coins, gems, XP, affection. Auto-tracked via chat events.

## Gift Module (`gift/`)

| Flow | Description |
|---|---|
| Catalog | List gifts with price (coins/gems), rarity, affection boost |
| Purchase | Deduct currency, add to inventory |
| Send | Remove from inventory → AI reaction → affection boost |

## Scene Module (`scene/`)

Unlock methods: level threshold, purchase, quest reward, relationship stage. Categories mapped to stages (e.g., LOVER → `bedroom`, `vacation_resort`, `stargazing`).

## Memory Module (`memory/`)

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `memory.service` | CRUD, pagination, favorites, milestone creation |
| `auto-memory.service` | Auto-memories: stage change, level up, conversation milestones, gifts |

**Types:** `MILESTONE`, `PHOTO`, `CONVERSATION`, `GIFT`, `EVENT`, `SPECIAL`, `DATE`, `CHAT`.

## DM Module (`dm/`)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| 1-on-1 | Direct messages between two users |
| Group | 3-50 members per conversation |
| Typing | Broadcast to other members |
| Read receipts | `markRead()` per user per conversation |

## Leaderboard Module (`leaderboard/`)

| Category | Cache |
|---|---|
| `level`, `affection`, `streak`, `achievements` | 5 minutes |

## Payment Module (`payment/`)

Stripe subscriptions, webhooks (`invoice.payment_succeeded`, `customer.subscription.deleted`), auto-downgrade expired premium to FREE.

## Monitoring Module (`monitoring/`)

Telemetry: request, error, auth, socket, job, security, business events. Metric rollups for dashboards.

## Upload Module (`upload/`)

DigitalOcean Spaces (S3-compatible) via multer + S3 SDK. File types: images (avatar, gifts, memories).

## Admin Module (`admin/`)

Tier config CRUD, pricing management. Auth: `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET`.

# Real-Time Communication (Socket.IO)

Socket.IO client for AI chat, DM, typing indicators, and cross-tab state sync.

**Reference:** `client/src/services/socket.ts`

## Connection Lifecycle

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Socket Service
  participant WS as Socket.IO Server

  C->>S: connect(token)
  S->>S: Cross-tab sync init
  S->>WS: io(WS_URL, { auth: { token } })
  WS-->>S: connect → join user:{userId} room
  S->>C: setConnected(true)
```

## Connection Management

```typescript
connect(token: string) {
  // Same token → no-op. Different token → disconnect first.
  this.socket = io(WS_URL, {
    auth: { token }, transports: ['websocket', 'polling'],
    reconnection: true, reconnectionAttempts: 5, reconnectionDelay: 1000,
  });
}
reconnectWithNewToken(newToken: string) { /* After token refresh */ }
```

## Inbound Events

| Event | Handler | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `message:receive` | `chat-store` | Add AI msg or replace optimistic via `clientId` |
| `character:typing` | `chat-store.setTyping(true)` | Show typing + 30s safety timeout |
| `character:mood_change` | `character-store` | Update mood |
| `character:mood_update` | `character-store` | Full mood info (score, emoji, factors) |
| `character:affection_change` | `character-store` | Update affection + level-up/relationship modals |
| `notification:proactive` | `notification-store` | AI-initiated (morning, night, miss_you) |
| `quest:completed` | `notification-store` | Quest completion toast |
| `milestone:unlocked` | `notification-store` | Milestone unlocked modal |
| `sync:state_request` | Emit `sync:response` | Share state with requesting tab |
| `sync:state_receive` | `chat-store.mergeMessages()` | Apply state from another tab |
| `dm:receive` | DM module | User-to-user message |
| `dm:typing` | DM module | Other user typing |

## Outbound Events

| Event | Method | Payload |
|---|---|---|
| `message:send` | `sendMessage(charId, content)` | `{ characterId, content, messageType }` |
| `typing:start` | `startTyping(charId)` | `characterId` |
| `typing:stop` | `stopTyping(charId)` | `characterId` |
| `sync:request` | `requestSync()` | — |
| `dm:send` | DM module | `{ conversationId, content, clientId }` |
| `dm:typing` | DM module | `{ conversationId }` |

## Optimistic UI Pattern

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User
  participant CS as Chat Store
  participant S as Server

  U->>CS: Type + send
  CS->>CS: Add temp msg with clientId
  CS->>S: emit message:send
  S->>S: Process (AI, DB)
  S-->>CS: message:receive (user + clientId)
  CS->>CS: replaceMessage(clientId, real)
  S-->>CS: message:receive (AI response)
  CS->>CS: addMessageIfUnique(AI)
```

1. Client adds message with `id = clientId` (temp)
2. Server echoes back with real `id` + matching `clientId`
3. `replaceMessage()` swaps temp → real
4. If temp not found, AI response added normally

## Typing Indicator

- Shows "AI is typing..." with animated dots
- Safety timeout: auto-clears after 30s
- Server delay: `min(4000, max(1500, length * 25))`

## External Listener Tracking

Listeners registered via `on()` are tracked and auto re-registered after reconnection:
```typescript
private externalListeners: ExternalListener[] = [];
private reRegisterExternalListeners() {
  this.externalListeners.forEach(({ event, callback }) => this.socket?.on(event, callback));
}
```

## Character Module (`character/`)

| Service | Responsibilities |
|---|---|
| `character.service` | CRUD, relationship stages, XP/level, milestone rewards, facts, customization |
| `mood.service` | Mood from time since chat, gifts, messages, affection, stage |
| `relationship.service` | Stage transitions |
| `template.service` | Template CRUD with `isDefault`/`isActive` |

**XP formula:** `100 + (level - 1) * 50` per level.

## Gamification Modules

| Module | Key Features |
|---|---|
| **Quest** | Daily/weekly/story quests, auto-tracked via chat, rewards: coins/gems/XP/affection |
| **Gift** | Catalog (coins/gems price), buy → inventory, send → AI reaction + affection boost |
| **Scene** | Unlock by level/purchase/quest/relationship stage. Categories mapped to stages |
| **Memory** | CRUD, favorites, auto-memories for stage change, level up, milestones |

**Memory types:** `MILESTONE`, `PHOTO`, `CONVERSATION`, `GIFT`, `EVENT`, `SPECIAL`, `DATE`, `CHAT`.

## DM Module (`dm/`)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| 1-on-1 + Group | 3-50 members per conversation |
| Typing | Broadcast to other members |
| Read receipts | `markRead()` per user per conversation |

## Business Modules

| Module | Description |
|---|---|
| **Leaderboard** | Rankings: `level`, `affection`, `streak`, `achievements`. 5-min cache |
| **Payment** | Stripe subscriptions, webhooks, auto-downgrade expired premium → FREE |
| **Analytics** | User stats for dashboard |
| **Monitoring** | Telemetry: request, error, auth, socket, job, security, business events |

## Infrastructure Modules

| Module | Description |
|---|---|
| **Upload** | DigitalOcean Spaces (S3) via multer + S3 SDK |
| **Admin** | Tier config CRUD, pricing. Auth: `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET` |

## Related

- [Routes](./routes.md)
- [Middleware](./middleware.md)
- [Socket Handlers](./socket-handlers.md)

# Socket Handlers

Socket.IO server handlers for AI chat, DM, cross-tab sync, and gamification notifications.

**Reference:** `server/src/sockets/index.ts`

## Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  C1[Tab 1] --> S[Socket.IO Server]
  C2[Tab 2] --> S
  C3[Tab 3] --> S
  S --> R[user:{userId} Room]
  S --> A[AI Service]
  S --> D[DM Service]
```

## Auth & Connection

```typescript
io.use(async (socket, next) => {
  const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
  const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
  // Cache-aside: Redis (10min TTL) → DB
  socket.userId = user.id;
  next();
});
// On connect: joins user:{userId} room
```

## Handler: `message:send`

AI chat with Redis dedup (setNX):

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant T as Tab
  participant S as Server
  T->>S: message:send { characterId, content, clientId }
  S->>S: Rate limit (10/10s), validate ≤ 2000 chars
  S->>S: setNX dedup:{userId}:{clientId} → drop if dup
  S->>T: emit character:typing (room)
  S->>S: chatService.sendMessage()
  S->>T: emit message:receive (user + clientId, isOwn: true)
  S->>S: Delay: 1-3s or length-proportional
  S->>T: emit message:receive (AI response)
  S->>T: emit character:affection_change (if changed)
  S->>T: emit quest:completed / milestone:unlocked
```

**All broadcasts to `user:{userId}` room:**

| Event | Condition |
|---|---|
| `message:receive` (user) | Always — `isOwn: true, clientId` |
| `character:typing` | Always — before AI processing |
| `message:receive` (AI) | After typing delay |
| `character:affection_change` | If changed (includes level/relationship data) |
| `character:mood_change` | If mood changed |
| `quest:completed` | If any quests completed |
| `milestone:unlocked` | If any milestones unlocked |

## Handler: `dm:send`

User-to-user messaging (1-on-1 + group 3-50):
```typescript
socket.on('dm:send', async ({ conversationId, content, clientId }) => {
  // Rate limit: 20/60s, Idempotency: dedup_dm setNX
  const message = await dmService.sendMessage(userId, conversationId, content);
  members.forEach(m => io.to(`user:${m.userId}`).emit('dm:receive', message));
});
```

| Event | Rate Limit | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dm:send` | 20/60s | Send DM, broadcast to members |
| `dm:typing` | 30/60s | Typing to other members |
| `dm:read` | None | Mark as read |

## Handler: Cross-Tab Sync

```
Tab A (new)           Server              Tab B (existing)
   |-- sync:request -->|                      |
   |                   |-- sync:state_request->|
   |                   |<- sync:response ------|
   |<- sync:state_receive                     |
```

## Handler: `character:mood_check`
```typescript
socket.on('character:mood_check', async ({ characterId }) => {
  const mood = await moodService.getCurrentMood(characterId);
  io.to(userRoom).emit('character:mood_update', { characterId, ...mood });
});
```

## Proactive Notification Check

On every connection, checks proactive AI notifications (debounced 5min/user, character list cached 5min):
```typescript
const result = await proactiveNotificationService.checkAndSendNotification(characterId);
if (result.shouldSend) {
  io.to(userRoom).emit('notification:proactive', { characterId, characterName, type, message });
}
```

## Related

- [Real-Time (Client)](../frontend/real-time.md)
- [Routes](./routes.md)
- [Backend Modules](./modules.md)

function_args.prompt:
Create the following markdown files for the VirtualGfriend project documentation in C:\Users\ChuHai\Documents\VirtualGfriend\docs\system\

## Project Context
VirtualGfriend uses Groq AI (OpenAI-compatible SDK) with rich Vietnamese system prompts, gender-aware pronouns, 8 occupations, 8 relationship stages, affection tiers (0-1000), time-of-day context, conversation summaries for long-term memory, and character facts with decay types.

## Files to Create:

### AI ENGINE (4 files in docs/system/ai-engine/)

### 1. ai-engine/system-prompt.md
- Rich Vietnamese system prompt with personality, relationship stage, affection level, time-of-day context
- Occupation-based dialogue: 8 occupations (student, office_worker, teacher, nurse, artist, developer, sales, freelancer) with unique dialogue patterns
- Pronoun adaptation: gender-aware pronouns (female→male: em/anh, male→female: anh/em, same-gender: mình/cậu)
- Time-of-day injection: morning/afternoon/evening/night/latenight with appropriate greetings
- Forbidden topic handling, quality scoring
- Reference: server/src/modules/ai/ai.service.ts

### 2. ai-engine/character-personality.md
- Personality types: 5 personality types with distinct behavior patterns
- 8 relationship stages with progression system
- Affection tiers (0-1000): 6 tiers with distinct behavior, pet names, language formality
- Mood system: mood changes based on interactions
- Avatar customization: style, hair, eyes, skin, outfit, accessories
- Character templates CRUD with isDefault, isActive flags
- Reference: server/src/modules/character/character.service.ts

### 3. ai-engine/emotion-detection.md
- Message emotion detection from user input
- AI emotion response generation
- Emotion types and mapping
- How emotion affects AI response tone and content
- Reference: server/src/modules/ai/ai.service.ts

### 4. ai-engine/memory-system.md
- Conversation summaries: AI-generated summaries stored in ConversationSummary model with keyTopics, emotionalTone, messageCount
- Character facts system: Facts categorized as permanent (never decay), evolving (slow decay), temporal (fast decay) — mimicking memory retention curves
- Fact extraction: AI inline extraction from chat + AI batch extraction
- Fact importance scoring (1-10)
- Memory types: MILESTONE, PHOTO, CONVERSATION, GIFT, EVENT, SPECIAL, DATE, CHAT
- Auto-generated memories: stage change, level up, conversation milestones
- Reference: server/src/modules/memory/memory.service.ts, server/src/modules/ai/ai.service.ts

## FRONTEND (5 files in docs/system/frontend/)

### 5. frontend/routing-structure.md
- Next.js 14 App Router structure
- Routes: /dashboard, /chat, /shop, /messages, /quests, /memories, /leaderboard, /settings/*, /auth/*, /admin
- Protected routes with auth guard
- Public routes: /auth/login, /auth/register, /auth/forgot-password
- Reference: client/src/app/

### 6. frontend/state-management.md
- Zustand stores: auth-store, chat-store, char-store, scene-store, notification store
- Persist middleware with localStorage (key: `vgfriend-auth`)
- Cross-tab sync via BroadcastChannel
- @tanstack/react-query for server state
- Reference: client/src/stores/

### 7. frontend/real-time.md
- Socket.IO Client implementation
- Connection lifecycle: connect → join rooms → listen for events
- Events: message:send/receive, dm:send/receive/typing, sync:request/response, quest/milestone notifies
- Optimistic UI: client adds temp message with clientId, server echoes back with real message, client replaces optimistic by matching clientId
- Typing indicator: displays when AI is "typing" with delay proportional to response length
- Reference: client/src/services/socket.ts

### 8. frontend/api-client.md
- ApiClient class with auto-refresh on 401
- JWT Bearer token in Authorization header
- BroadcastChannel cross-tab sync for auth tokens
- Error handling: 401 → auto-refresh → retry original request
- API modules organized by domain
- Reference: client/src/services/api.ts

### 9. frontend/ui-components.md
- Radix UI components: 13 components (avatar, dialog, dropdown, toast, tabs, etc.)
- TailwindCSS with custom theme
- Framer Motion animations
- class-variance-authority for variant management
- clsx + tailwind-merge for conditional classes
- Lucide React icons
- Chart.js + react-chartjs-2 for data visualization
- Reference: client/src/components/

## BACKEND (4 files in docs/system/backend/)

### 10. backend/routes.md
- Complete API endpoint reference organized by module:
  - /api/auth: register, login, refresh, logout, forgot-password, verify-otp, reset-password, verify-registration, me
  - /api/users: profile, settings, privacy
  - /api/character: CRUD, customize, facts, templates, relationship
  - /api/chat: messages (paginated), send, search
  - /api/quests: all, daily, claim/:questId
  - /api/gifts, /api/shop: shop catalog, inventory, buy, send
  - /api/scenes: list, unlock, set-active
  - /api/memories: list, create, favorite, delete
  - /api/game: daily-login, progress
  - /api/analytics: stats
  - /api/dm: conversations, messages, unread-count
  - /api/leaderboard: :category (level, affection, streak, achievements)
  - /api/admin: pricing/tier config
  - /api/payment: Stripe webhook, subscription management
  - /api/config/tier-plans: GET (public)
  - /health, /ready: health checks
- Reference: server/src/routes/

### 11. backend/middleware.md
- Auth middleware: JWT Bearer verification with Redis cache-aside (15min TTL), falls back to DB
- Admin middleware: separate admin auth with `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET`
- Premium middleware: enforces tier requirements for quests, gifts, scenes, shop items
- Rate limiter middleware: per-IP for public, per-user (JWT-based) for authenticated
- Error handling middleware
- Reference: server/src/middleware/

### 12. backend/socket-handlers.md
- message:send/receive: AI chat message handling with dedup via Redis setNX
- dm:send/receive/typing: user-to-user messaging
- sync:request/response: cross-tab state sync
- quest/milestone notifies: gamification event notifications
- Rate limiting: message (10/10s), DM (20/60s), typing (30/60s)
- Reference: server/src/sockets/

### 13. backend/modules.md
- AI module: Groq/OpenAI, system prompt generation, chat processing, emotion detection, fact extraction, quality scoring
- Chat module: sendMessage flow, paginated history, search, message dedup
- Character module: CRUD, personality, mood, facts, templates, relationship stages
- Quest module: daily/weekly/story quests, progress tracking, reward claiming
- Gift module: shop catalog, buy with coins/gems, send to character, AI reaction, affection boost
- Scene module: unlockable environments, unlock by level/purchase/quest/relationship
- Memory module: milestone tracking, auto-generated memories, favorites
- DM module: user-to-user messaging, 1-on-1 + group chats (3-50 members), typing indicators, read receipts
- Leaderboard module: rankings by level, affection, streak, achievements, 5-min cache
- Payment module: Stripe subscriptions, webhooks, billing
- Monitoring module: request/error/auth/socket/job/security/business event tracking, metric rollups
- Upload module: file upload to DigitalOcean Spaces (multer + S3)
- Reference: server/src/modules/

Each file should:
- Be under 100-120 lines
- Include code snippets where relevant
- Have Mermaid diagrams for flows
- Include "Related" section with relative links
- Be technically precise

Write all 13 files now.

args.prompt:
Create the following markdown files for the VirtualGfriend project documentation in C:\Users\ChuHai\Documents\VirtualGfriend\docs\system\

## Project Context
VirtualGfriend has extensive gamification: quests (daily/weekly/story/achievement/event/relationship), gifts/shop with 5 rarity tiers, scenes, memories, leaderboard, daily rewards, streaks. Security includes JWT auth, rate limiting, OTP verification, premium gating. Deployment via Docker Compose + Nginx + GitHub Actions.

## Files to Create:

### GAMIFICATION (7 files in docs/system/gamification/)

### 1. gamification/quests.md
- Quest types: Daily, Weekly, Story, Achievement, Event, Relationship
- Requirements stored as JSON
- Rewards: XP, coins, gems, affection
- requiresPremium, minimumTier fields for premium gating
- UserQuest: progress tracking, status (IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED/CLAIMED/EXPIRED)
- Reward claiming flow
- Reference: server/src/modules/quest/

### 2. gamification/gifts-shop.md
- Shop catalog with 5 rarity tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary
- Buy with coins or gems
- Gift properties: name, emoji, category, rarity, priceCoins, priceGems, affectionBonus, requiresPremium, minimumTier
- Limited-time items
- UserGift inventory: userId, giftId, quantity
- GiftHistory: userId, characterId, giftId, message, reaction
- Send to character → AI reaction → affection boost
- Reference: server/src/modules/gift/, server/src/modules/shop/

### 3. gamification/levels-affection.md
- Character level system with XP progression
- Affection system: 0-1000 scale, 6 affection tiers
- Each tier has distinct behavior, pet names, language formality
- From formal "bạn" to intimate "anh yêu của em"
- Affection changes from: chat interactions, gift giving, quest completion

function_args.content:
# Quests System

## Overview
Quest system provides structured objectives for users to earn XP, coins, gems, and affection. Quests auto-start daily, track progress via game events, and support auto-claiming.

## Quest Types

| Type | Description | Reset Cycle |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| `DAILY` | Everyday objectives (chat, greet, gift) | Daily (midnight UTC) |
| `WEEKLY` | Longer-term objectives | Weekly |
| `STORY` | Narrative-driven quests | One-time |
| `ACHIEVEMENT` | Milestone-based unlocks | Permanent |
| `EVENT` | Time-limited seasonal quests | Event duration |
| `RELATIONSHIP` | Bond-specific objectives | Per character |

## Data Model

```prisma
Quest {
  id, type, title, description,
  requirements: JSON,   // { action: "send_message", count: 10 }
  rewardXp, rewardCoins, rewardGems, rewardAffection,
  requiresPremium, minimumTier,  // Premium gating
  sortOrder, isActive
}

UserQuest {
  id, userId, questId,
  progress, maxProgress,
  status: "IN_PROGRESS" | "COMPLETED" | "CLAIMED" | "EXPIRED",
  startedAt, completedAt, claimedAt
}
```

## Quest Progress Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant GameEvent
    participant QuestService
    participant DB
    participant CharacterService

    User->>GameEvent: processAction(SEND_MESSAGE)
    GameEvent->>GameEvent: autoStartDailyQuests (debounced)
    GameEvent->>QuestService: updateQuestProgress(action)
    QuestService->>DB: Find IN_PROGRESS quests
    QuestService->>DB: Batch update progress
    alt Progress >= maxProgress
        QuestService->>QuestService: Auto-claim quest
        QuestService->>DB: Status → CLAIMED
        QuestService->>DB: Increment coins, gems
        QuestService->>CharacterService: addExperience + updateAffection
        GameEvent->>GameEvent: checkMilestones
    end
    GameEvent-->>User: Return questsCompleted[]
```

## Reward Claiming Flow

1. **Auto-claim**: `gameEventService.autoClaimQuest()` runs immediately on completion
2. **Manual claim**: `POST /api/quests/claim/:questId` — validates `status === COMPLETED`
3. **Transaction**: Atomic — status update + currency grant happen together
4. **Side effects**: XP/affection applied to active character (non-critical, outside transaction)

## Premium Gating
- `requiresPremium: true` — blocks FREE tier users
- `minimumTier: "BASIC"|"PRO"|"ULTIMATE"` — tier-specific access
- Checked via `tier-config.service.canAccessPremiumQuests`

## Related
- [Gifts & Shop](./gifts-shop.md)
- [Levels & Affection](./levels-affection.md)
- [Daily Rewards](./daily-rewards.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/quest/`, `server/src/modules/game/game-event.service.ts`

# Gifts & Shop System

## Overview
Shop catalog with 5 rarity tiers. Users buy gifts with coins or gems, then send to their character for AI-generated reactions and affection boosts.

## Rarity Tiers

| Tier | Price Range | Affection Bonus |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| Common | 50-200 coins | +1-5 |
| Uncommon | 200-500 coins | +5-15 |
| Rare | 500-1000 coins / 10-30 gems | +15-30 |
| Epic | 30-80 gems | +30-60 |
| Legendary | 80-200 gems | +60-100 |

## Gift Properties

```typescript
Gift {
  id, name, emoji, description,
  category: string,        // "flowers", "jewelry", "food", etc.
  rarity: "COMMON" | "UNCOMMON" | "RARE" | "EPIC" | "LEGENDARY",
  priceCoins, priceGems,
  affectionBonus,          // Amount added on send
  requiresPremium, minimumTier,  // Premium gating
  isActive, sortOrder
}
```

## Data Model

```prisma
UserGift {
  id, userId, giftId, quantity  // Inventory
}

GiftHistory {
  id, userId, characterId, giftId,
  message, reaction, createdAt
}
```

## Buy & Send Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant GiftService
    participant DB
    participant AIService
    participant CharacterService
    participant GameEvent

    User->>GiftService: buyGift(giftId, qty, coins|gems)
    GiftService->>DB: Check balance, deduct currency
    GiftService->>DB: Upsert UserGift (quantity += qty)
    GiftService-->>User: Return purchase confirmation

    User->>GiftService: sendGift(characterId, giftId, message?)
    GiftService->>DB: Decrement UserGift quantity
    GiftService->>AIService: Generate reaction (personality-aware)
    AIService-->>GiftService: reaction text
    GiftService->>DB: Create GiftHistory record
    GiftService->>DB: Create SYSTEM + AI messages
    GiftService->>CharacterService: updateAffection(+bonus)
    GiftService->>GameEvent: processAction(SEND_GIFT)
    GiftService-->>User: Return { reaction, affectionGained, questsCompleted }
```

## AI Gift Reaction
- Groq generates personality-aware response in 1-2 Vietnamese sentences
- Falls back to: `"Wow, {name} luôn hả? Cảm ơn nhiều nha 💕"`
- Reaction saved as `GiftHistory.reaction` + auto-message in chat

## Endpoints
- `GET /api/gifts/` — List all active gifts (cached 1hr)
- `GET /api/gifts/inventory` — User's gift inventory
- `POST /api/gifts/buy` — Purchase with coins or gems
- `POST /api/gifts/send` — Send to character
- `GET /api/gifts/history?page=&limit=` — Paginated history

## Related
- [Quests](./quests.md)
- [Levels & Affection](./levels-affection.md)
- [Scenes](./scenes.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/gift/`

# Levels & Affection System

## Overview
Dual progression system: character levels (XP-based) and affection (0-1000 scale) drive relationship stages, AI behavior, pet names, and language formality.

## Affection Scale (0-1000)

| Affection | Stage | Pet Names | Language Style |
|-----------|-------|-----------|----------------|
| 0-99 | STRANGER | — | Formal "bạn", polite |
| 100-249 | ACQUAINTANCE | "bạn ơi" | Friendly, occasional emoji |
| 250-449 | FRIEND | "bạn ơi", "cậu" | Close, shares details |
| 450-599 | CLOSE_FRIEND | "anh yêu", "bạn yêu", "honey" | Intimate, remembers details |
| 600-749 | CRUSH | "anh yêu", "cưng", "babe" | Romantic, sweet |
| 750-849 | DATING | "anh yêu của em", "người yêu dấu" | Natural couple language |
| 850-899 | IN_LOVE | "tình yêu của đời em", "darling" | Deep, unconditional |
| 900-1000 | LOVER | "anh yêu của em", "người yêu dấu" |最深 attachment |

## XP Progression

```typescript
// XP required per level: 100 + (level - 1) * 50
// Level 1→2: 100 XP  |  Level 5→6: 300 XP  |  Level 10→11: 550 XP
```

### Level Milestones

| Level | Coins | Gems | Affection | Unlocks |
|-------|-------|------|-----------|---------|
| 5 | 200 | 20 | +30 | Storytelling, tulip gift |
| 10 | 500 | 50 | +50 | Activity suggestions, park scene |
| 15 | 800 | 80 | +80 | Impromptu poetry, gold necklace |
| 20 | 1000 | 100 | +100 | Share secrets, vacation trip |
| 25 | 1500 | 150 | +150 | Special memories, diamond ring |
| 30 | 2000 | 200 | +200 | Eternal love |

## Affection Sources

| Source | Typical Change |
|--------|---------------|
| Chat (quality-based) | -2 to +5 |
| Gift giving | +1 to +100 |
| Quest completion | +10 to +50 |
| Milestone rewards | +20 to +100 |

## AI Behavior Integration
- `buildSystemPrompt()` reads affection tier for pet names and language style
- Each tier has distinct `behavior` string injected into system prompt
- Pet names array passed to AI as usage hints
- Affection change evaluated from message quality score (0-10)

## Character Service APIs

```typescript
characterService.updateAffection(characterId, amount)
// → Clamps to 0-1000, recalculates stage, fires stage-change event

characterService.addExperience(characterId, xp)
// → Handles level-up loop, milestone rewards, auto-memory creation
```

## Related
- [Gifts & Shop](./gifts-shop.md)
- [Relationship System](../../api/character.md)
- [Memories](./memories.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/character/character.service.ts`, `relationship.service.ts`

# Scenes System

## Overview
Unlockable environments that set the backdrop for conversations. Scenes unlock through level progression, purchases, quest completion, events, or relationship stage advancement.

## Scene Categories by Stage

| Stage | Unlocked Categories |
|-------|---------------------|
| STRANGER | school_classroom, public_street, bus_stop |
| ACQUAINTANCE | cafe, library, park_day |
| FRIEND | home_living_room, restaurant, movie_theater |
| CLOSE_FRIEND | beach_day, amusement_park, shopping_mall |
| CRUSH | park_sunset, rooftop_view, garden |
| DATING | fancy_restaurant, beach_night, festival |
| IN_LOVE | romantic_getaway, couple_spa, sunset_cruise |
| LOVER | bedroom, vacation_resort, stargazing, proposal_spot |

## Scene Properties

```typescript
Scene {
  id, name, description, imageUrl,
  category, ambiance,
  unlockMethod: "level" | "purchase" | "quest" | "event" | "relationship",
  unlockValue: number,       // Level required or gem cost
  requiredStage: RelationshipStage | null,
  priceGems,
  requiresPremium,
  isDefault, isActive, sortOrder
}
```

## Unlock Logic

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant SceneService
    participant DB
    participant Cache

    User->>SceneService: unlockScene(sceneId)
    SceneService->>DB: Get user (gems, premiumTier)
    SceneService->>DB: Get character (level, affection)
    SceneService->>DB: Get scene details
    alt Already unlocked / isDefault
        SceneService-->>User: 400 SCENE_ALREADY_UNLOCKED
    end
    alt requiresPremium && !canAccessPremiumScenes
        SceneService-->>User: 403 PREMIUM_REQUIRED
    end
    alt requiredStage && !isStageReached
        SceneService-->>User: 400 STAGE_REQUIRED
    end
    alt unlockMethod === "level" && character.level < unlockValue
        SceneService-->>User: 400 LEVEL_REQUIRED
    end
    alt unlockMethod === "purchase" && priceGems > 0
        SceneService->>DB: Deduct gems (transaction)
    end
    SceneService->>DB: Create CharacterScene record
    SceneService-->>User: { scene, unlocked: true }
```

## Active Scene
- Stored in `UserSettings.activeSceneId` via `setActiveScene()`
- Scene validated on activation (unlock + premium + stage checks)
- Used by AI prompt to set conversation ambiance

## Newly Unlocked Notification
`getNewlyUnlockedScenes(userId, newStage)` returns scenes unlocked by stage change — triggers UI notification.

## Related
- [Levels & Affection](./levels-affection.md)
- [Gifts & Shop](./gifts-shop.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/scene/scene.service.ts`

# Memories System

## Overview
Persistent memory gallery capturing milestones, conversations, gifts, and special events. Supports auto-generation and manual creation with favorite marking.

## Memory Types

| Type | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `MILESTONE` | Auto/Manual | Affection, level, relationship stages |
| `PHOTO` | Manual | Saved screenshots / images |
| `CONVERSATION` | Manual | Pinned chat moments |
| `GIFT` | Auto | Gift history snapshots |
| `EVENT` | Auto | Level ups, game events |
| `SPECIAL` | Manual | Custom memories |
| `DATE` | Manual/Event | Virtual date records |
| `CHAT` | Auto | Notable conversation snippets |

## Data Model

```prisma
Memory {
  id, userId, characterId,
  title, description, imageUrl,
  type: MemoryType,
  milestone: String?,       // e.g. "affection_500", "level_10"
  isFavorite: Boolean,
  isAutoGenerated: Boolean,
  autoGenSource: String?,
  metadata: JSON,
  createdAt
}
```

## Auto-Generated Memories

```typescript
// Triggered from chat flow (background, non-blocking)
autoMemoryService.createRelationshipStageMemory(userId, charId, newStage)
autoMemoryService.createLevelUpMemory(userId, charId, newLevel)       // Every 5 levels
autoMemoryService.checkAffinityMilestone(userId, charId, prev, new)   // 100, 300, 500, 700, 900
```

## Gallery Operations

| Operation | Endpoint | Notes |
|-----------|----------|-------|
| List | `GET /api/memories?page=&limit=&type=` | Paginated, filterable |
| Milestones | `GET /api/memories/milestones` | All MILESTONE type, ascending |
| Create | `POST /api/memories` | Manual creation |
| Toggle Favorite | `PATCH /api/memories/:id/favorite` | Flips `isFavorite` |
| Delete | `DELETE /api/memories/:id` | Soft delete via ownership check |

## Memory Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant ChatService
    participant AutoMemory
    participant DB
    participant User

    ChatService->>ChatService: sendMessage completes
    ChatService->>AutoMemory: createRelationshipStageMemory (background)
    AutoMemory->>DB: Check duplicate milestone
    alt No duplicate
        AutoMemory->>DB: Create Memory record
    end
    ChatService->>AutoMemory: checkAffinityMilestone
    AutoMemory->>DB: Check if prevAffection < milestone <= newAffection
    alt Crossed milestone
        AutoMemory->>DB: Create Memory record
    end
    User->>DB: GET /api/memories (gallery view)
    DB-->>User: Paginated memory list
```

## Related
- [Levels & Affection](./levels-affection.md)
- [Quests](./quests.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/memory/`, `auto-memory.service.ts`

# Leaderboard System

## Overview
Global rankings displaying top users across multiple competitive categories. Results cached for 5 minutes to reduce database load.

## Categories

| Category | Sort Key | Source Table |
|----------|----------|--------------|
| `level` | Character level (desc) + XP (desc) | `Character` (distinct userId) |
| `affection` | Character affection (desc) | `Character` (distinct userId) |
| `streak` | User streak count (desc) | `User` |
| `achievements` | Count of unlocked UserAchievements | `UserAchievement` (groupBy) |

## Cache Strategy
- Cache key: `leaderboard:{category}` (e.g., `leaderboard:level`)
- TTL: **300 seconds (5 minutes)**
- On cache miss: Query DB → Build entries → Cache → Return
- Default limit: 20 entries per category

## Leaderboard Entry Format

```typescript
interface LeaderboardEntry {
  rank: number;           // 1-based ranking
  userId: string;
  username: string | null;
  displayName: string | null;
  avatar: string | null;
  isPremium: boolean;     // Premium tier indicator
  value: number;          // Score (level, affection, streak, or achievement count)
}
```

## API Endpoints

```
GET /api/leaderboard/:category?limit=20
  → Returns cached or fresh leaderboard entries

GET /api/leaderboard/rank/:category
  → Returns current user's rank: { rank, value }
```

## Performance Design
- `distinct: ['userId']` ensures one entry per user
- `GROUP BY` for achievements avoids N+1 queries
- Cache reduces DB load: max 4 queries per 5-min window (one per category)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant LeaderboardService
    participant Redis
    participant DB

    Client->>LeaderboardService: GET /leaderboard/level?limit=20
    LeaderboardService->>Redis: GET leaderboard:level
    alt Cache hit
        Redis-->>LeaderboardService: Cached entries
    else Cache miss
        LeaderboardService->>DB: Query top characters by level
        DB-->>LeaderboardService: Results
        LeaderboardService->>Redis: SET leaderboard:level (300s TTL)
    end
    LeaderboardService-->>Client: LeaderboardEntry[]
```

## Related
- [Daily Rewards](./daily-rewards.md)
- [Quests](./quests.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/leaderboard/`

# Daily Rewards System

## Overview
Daily login rewards with a 7-day progressive cycle. Rewards increase each day. Integrated with streak tracking and game event processing.

## 7-Day Reward Cycle

| Day | Reward Type | Typical Value |
|-----|-------------|---------------|
| 1 | Coins | 50-100 |
| 2 | Coins | 100-150 |
| 3 | Gems | 5-10 |
| 4 | Affection | 10-20 |
| 5 | Coins | 200-300 |
| 6 | XP | 50-100 |
| 7 | Gems + Coins | 20 gems + 500 coins |

*Cycle resets after day 7 or on missed day.*

## Streak Tracking

```prisma
User {
  streak: Int,           // Consecutive login days
  lastActiveAt: DateTime,
  lastLoginAt: DateTime,
}
```

Streak logic (from `gameEventService.updateUserStats`):
- **Continues**: `lastActiveDay === yesterday` → `streak += 1`
- **Breaks**: `lastActiveDay < yesterday` → `streak = 1`
- **Already today**: No streak change, only `lastActiveAt` updated

## Daily Login Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant GameRouter
    participant GameEvent
    participant DB
    participant Redis

    Client->>GameRouter: POST /api/game/daily-login
    GameRouter->>GameEvent: processAction(DAILY_LOGIN)
    GameEvent->>Redis: Check daily_quests_started debounce
    GameEvent->>GameEvent: autoStartDailyQuests
    GameEvent->>GameEvent: updateQuestProgress(DAILY_LOGIN)
    GameEvent->>GameEvent: updateUserStats
    updateUserStats->>DB: Check lastActiveAt vs today
    alt First activity today
        updateUserStats->>DB: Update streak
        updateUserStats->>GameEvent: processAction(DAILY_LOGIN)
    end
    GameEvent-->>Client: { questsCompleted, milestonesUnlocked }
```

## Duplicate Prevention
- Daily quests debounced via Redis key `daily_quests_started:{userId}` with TTL until midnight
- User stats update debounced via `user_stats_check:{userId}` with 60s TTL
- Ensures rewards only granted once per calendar day

## Related
- [Quests](./quests.md)
- [Leaderboard](./leaderboard.md)
- Source: `server/src/modules/game/game-event.service.ts`, `game.routes.ts`

# Authentication Security

## Overview
JWT-based authentication with access/refresh token rotation, bcrypt password hashing, OTP email verification, and Redis cache-aside for user lookups.

## Token Pattern

```
┌─────────────────┐     ┌──────────────────┐
│  Access Token   │     │  Refresh Token   │
│  15 min expiry  │     │   7 day expiry   │
│  Bearer header  │     │  Stored in DB    │
└─────────────────┘     └──────────────────┘
```

- **Access Token**: JWT signed with `JWT_SECRET`, passed as `Bearer` header
- **Refresh Token**: JWT signed with `JWT_REFRESH_SECRET`, stored in `RefreshToken` table
- **Rotation**: On refresh, old token revoked, new pair issued (atomic transaction)
- **Admin Auth**: Separate `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET` for admin endpoints

## Password Security

```typescript
// Bcrypt with cost factor 12
const hashed = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);
// Validation: 8-128 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char
```

## Registration Flow (2-Step)

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant AuthService
    participant Redis
    participant Email
    participant DB

    Client->>AuthService: POST /auth/register {email, password}
    AuthService->>AuthService: validatePassword()
    AuthService->>DB: Check email/username uniqueness
    AuthService->>AuthService: bcrypt.hash(password, 12)
    AuthService->>Redis: SET pending_registration:{email} (15min TTL)
    AuthService->>Email: Send OTP via Nodemailer
    AuthService-->>Client: { status: "OTP_SENT" }

    Client->>AuthService: POST /auth/verify-registration {email, otp}
    AuthService->>AuthService: Verify OTP
    AuthService->>Redis: GET pending_registration:{email}
    AuthService->>DB: CREATE user (coins:100, gems:10)
    AuthService->>AuthService: Generate JWT pair
    AuthService->>DB: Store refresh token
    AuthService->>Redis: DEL pending_registration
    AuthService-->>Client: { user, tokens }
```

## Auth Middleware

```typescript
// Cache-aside: Redis (15min TTL) → DB fallback
async function getUserFromCacheOrDb(userId: string) {
  const cached = await cache.get(`user:auth:${userId}`);
  if (cached) return cached;
  const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ ... });
  await cache.set(`user:auth:${userId}`, user, 15 * 60);
  return user;
}
```

## Zustand Persist (Client)
- Auth state persisted via `localStorage`
- Consider encryption for sensitive tokens in production
- Tokens auto-refresh on 401 response

# Input Validation

## Overview
All inputs validated server-side using password validation utilities, Zod-equivalent patterns, and type-safe Prisma queries.

## Password Validation

```typescript
// server/src/lib/constants.ts
PASSWORD_REQUIREMENTS = {
  MIN_LENGTH: 8,
  MAX_LENGTH: 128,
  REQUIRE_UPPERCASE: true,
  REQUIRE_LOWERCASE: true,
  REQUIRE_NUMBER: true,
  REQUIRE_SPECIAL: true,
}

function validatePassword(password: string): { valid: boolean; errors: string[] }
```

Vietnamese error messages for each failed requirement.

## OTP System

### Generation
- 6-digit numeric OTP
- Stored in Redis with TTL (typically 5-15 minutes)
- Rate limited: 3 requests/minute per email

### Verification
- Exact match against stored OTP
- Single-use: deleted after successful verification
- Rate limited: 5 attempts per 15 minutes

## Email Validation
- Standard regex pattern on registration
- Normalized: `email.toLowerCase().trim()`
- Verified via OTP before account activation

## Message Content Validation

```typescript
MESSAGE_LIMITS = {
  MAX_CHAT_MESSAGE_LENGTH: 2000,
  MAX_DM_MESSAGE_LENGTH: 2000,
  MAX_FACT_VALUE_LENGTH: 500,
  MAX_CHARACTER_NAME_LENGTH: 50,
}
```

- Chat messages trimmed and validated before DB insert
- DM content validated in `dmService.sendMessage()`

## File Upload Validation
- Multer middleware for file parsing
- S3/DigitalOcean Spaces for storage
- File type whitelist enforced
- Size limits configured per endpoint

## Affection/Level Ranges

```typescript
VALIDATION = {
  AFFECTION_MIN: 0,
  AFFECTION_MAX: 1000,
  LEVEL_MIN: 1,
  LEVEL_MAX: 100,
  FACT_IMPORTANCE_MIN: 1,
  FACT_IMPORTANCE_MAX: 10,
}
```

All values clamped to these ranges on update.

- [Auth Security](./auth-security.md)
- [Rate Limiting](./rate-limiting.md)

# Data Protection

## Overview
Multi-layered data protection: CORS, security headers, HTTPS, encrypted secrets, and cloud storage access controls.

## CORS Configuration

```typescript
// server environment
CORS_ORIGIN=https://yourdomain.com  // Single allowed origin
```

- Configured via `CORS_ORIGIN` env var
- Single-origin policy (not wildcard)
- Applied at Express app level

## Helmet Security Headers

Nginx adds security headers at the reverse proxy level:

```nginx
add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;
```

## HTTPS via Nginx + Let's Encrypt

```nginx
server {
    listen 443 ssl http2;
    ssl_certificate /etc/nginx/ssl/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/privkey.pem;
    ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
    # Modern cipher suite
}

server {
    listen 80;
    # Redirects all HTTP → HTTPS (301)
    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ { root /var/www/certbot; }
}
```

- Certificates mounted via Docker volume: `./nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro`
- Auto-renewal via Certbot container (external)

## Database Connection Security
- `DATABASE_URL` constructed from Docker secrets, not hardcoded
- Internal Docker network (`vgfriend-network`) isolates DB from public access
- Port 5432 exposed only for development

## Environment Variables

| Category | Variables |
|----------|-----------|
| Database | `POSTGRES_USER`, `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`, `DATABASE_URL` |
| Auth | `JWT_SECRET`, `JWT_REFRESH_SECRET`, `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET` |
| AI | `GROQ_API_KEY` |
| Payments | `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY`, `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` |
| Email | `SMTP_USER`, `SMTP_PASS` |
| Storage | `DO_SPACES_KEY`, `DO_SPACES_SECRET` |

**Never committed**: `.env` files gitignored. Use `.env.production.example` as template.

## Stripe Webhook Verification
- `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` validates incoming webhook signatures
- Raw body preserved for signature verification
- Events: `checkout.session.completed`, `invoice.paid`, `customer.subscription.*`

## DigitalOcean Spaces Access Controls
- `DO_SPACES_KEY` / `DO_SPACES_SECRET` — IAM credentials with bucket-scoped permissions
- Endpoint: `https://sgp1.digitaloceanspaces.com`
- Bucket: configured via `DO_SPACES_BUCKET`

- [Nginx Config](../deployment/nginx-config.md)
